iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (stable). Day 21 Hour 18 auto - IMMINENT. CENTCOM clears Hormuz (16 minelayers destroyed, warplanes hunting Iranian vessels). 2,500 more Marines + 3 warships deployed. Iran threatens 'world tourism sites'. latest_news.headline: CENTCOM destroys 16 Iranian minelayer vessels near Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: US forces eliminate 16 Iranian minelaying vessels near Strait of Hormuz. New front opened to clear mines and reopen shipping lane.

latest_news.headline: Trump considering seizing or blockading Iran's Kharg Island
latest_news.text: Trump weighing order to seize/blockade Kharg Island (handles 90% of Iran oil exports). Risk: irrevocable damage to global economy. Netanyahu also hints at ground deployment.

latest_news.headline: West Point analysis: Hormuz blockade 'paralyzing' US defense industrial base
latest_news.text: West Point Modern War Institute warns Hormuz closure causing 'paralyzing, real-time problem' for US defense manufacturing. Sulfur prices up 25% since war began (165% YoY). Critical minerals supply shock threatens weapons production. Never modeled before.

latest_news.headline: Bloomberg: Maritime traffic through Strait of Hormuz near-standstill
latest_news.text: Bloomberg confirms: Hormuz traffic remains near-standstill weeks after US-Israel strikes. Naval escorts alone may not solve the problem.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 87% (stable). Day 21 Hour 18 auto - IMMINENT. IDF ground ops continue on multiple axes. 1,000+ killed in Lebanon, 2,584 wounded. 1M+ displaced. Hezbollah destroys 6 Merkavas. Central Beirut strike kills 10. IDF committed for months. Litani River bridges struck. Updated 2026-03-20T18:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: Hezbollah destroys 6 Israeli Merkava tanks in southern Lebanon
latest_news.text: Hezbollah claims destruction of 6 Israeli Merkava tanks during attempted advance into Taybeh towards Deir Siryan area. Stiff ground resistance slowing Israeli advance.

latest_news.headline: Israeli strikes kill 10 in central Beirut, hospital ICU damaged
latest_news.text: At least 10 killed in central Beirut airstrike. Hospital ICU damaged in Nabatieh. Wide-scale shelling of southern Lebanon towns. 1M+ displaced.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 5% (stable). Day 21 Hour 18 auto - DETERRENT. 3rd NATO Patriot deployed to Incirlik. 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkey. NATO rules out Article 5. Turkey rebukes Israel, stays with NATO. No new escalatory developments. Updated 2026-03-20T18:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 36% (up). Day 21 Hour 18 auto - CRITICAL. Peace talks 'situational pause' due to Iran. Russia readies new offensive. Deadliest day of 2026: 1,700+ troops lost. Zelensky sends political delegation to US Mar 21 (Russia not attending). Putin exploiting US distraction. Updated 2026-03-20T18:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: Kremlin confirms Ukraine peace talks on pause - 'situational' due to Iran war
latest_news.text: Kremlin says pause in Ukraine peace talks is 'situational' due to Iran conflict consuming US bandwidth. Kyiv says new meeting planned. Zelensky sends negotiating team to US for Saturday talks despite pause.

latest_news.headline: Gabbard tells Senate: Russia 'maintains upper hand' in Ukraine war
latest_news.text: DNI Gabbard testifies Russia 'maintained the upper hand' in Ukraine war. Moscow likely to continue war of attrition until agreement reached. Putin says open to peace but actions contradict.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 36% (stable). Day 21 Hour 18 auto - CRITICAL. Eid ceasefire holding through Mar 23. TTP 3-day truce also active. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected. Qatar welcomes truce. Updated 2026-03-20T18:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding, TTP also declares 3-day truce
latest_news.text: 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Qatar welcomes truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected.

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: Day 21 Hour 18. ESCALATION: CENTCOM aggressive Hormuz clearing ops, Iran broadens threats to 'world tourism sites', 2,500 more Marines deployed. DE-ESCALATION: Netanyahu says war 'ending faster than people think', Trump says no ground troops, energy strikes halted at Trump request, allies join Hormuz coalition (UK/France/Germany/Italy/Netherlands/Japan). MIXED — military ops intensifying but diplomatic off-ramps forming. Key watch: post-Eid Pakistan-Afghanistan resumption, Russia exploiting distraction for new Ukraine offensive.

latest_news.headline: CENTCOM warplanes 'hunting and killing' Iranian vessels in Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: US warplanes and attack helicopters ramped up assaults on Iranian drones and naval vessels. Gen. Dan Caine: forces are 'hunting and killing' Iran's fast-attack watercraft in contested sea lanes. 16 minelayers already destroyed.

latest_news.headline: Iran threatens 'world tourism sites' — broadens threat scope beyond energy
latest_news.text: Iran warns threats to 'world tourism sites' and says 'still building missiles'. Broadening target category beyond regional energy infrastructure to global soft targets.

latest_news.headline: Netanyahu: war 'ending faster than people think' — signals mixed
latest_news.text: 'This war ending a lot faster than people think. We are winning and Iran is being decimated.' But also says 'there has to be a ground component' — mixed signals on trajectory.

latest_news.headline: Hormuz traffic down 95% — BBC Verify analysis
latest_news.text: BBC Verify: just under 100 ships passed through Hormuz since March 1. Pre-war: 138 ships/day. Daily traffic down 95%. 21 confirmed attacks on merchant ships as of Mar 12.

latest_news.headline: Russia readies new offensive as Ukraine peace talks on pause
latest_news.text: With US-brokered peace talks paused due to Iran war, Putin expected to expand military gains via new offensives. Russia suffered deadliest day of 2026: 1,700+ troops lost.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 21, 17:04 UTC) - US deploys 2,500 more Marines + 3 warships. Iran threatens 'world tourism sites' and 'fraction of firepower' used. Netanyahu says war ending 'faster than people think' — mixed signals (ground component + de-escalation). Bahrain intercepted 238 drones total. Iran civilian toll 1,400+ dead. Oil elevated. Updated 2026-03-20T17:04:00Z
